records.m_Talk_ENG: F-Fione! The other knights, they've turned into C.O.s...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: F-Fione! The other knights, they've turned into C.O.s...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: F-Fione! The other knights, they've turned into C.O.s...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: They were all stationed at HQ! What on earth happened here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: They were all stationed at HQ! What on earth happened here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: They were all stationed at HQ! What on earth happened here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stay calm! If this is part of the Corruption disaster, we absolutely cannot let them escape outside!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stay calm! If this is part of the Corruption disaster, we absolutely cannot let them escape outside!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stay calm! If this is part of the Corruption disaster, we absolutely cannot let them escape outside!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Form up! Our top priority is to trap and contain them!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Form up! Our top priority is to trap and contain them!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Form up! Our top priority is to trap and contain them!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Bingo!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Bingo!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Bingo!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You figured out it was necromancy after just a short chat? You're way smarter than me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You figured out it was necromancy after just a short chat? You're way smarter than me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You figured out it was necromancy after just a short chat? You're way smarter than me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm dumb, so even after reviving them with the <color=#ffd34c>Staff</color>, I couldn't tell if I'd really killed them or not!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm dumb, so even after reviving them with the <color=#ffd34c>Staff</color>, I couldn't tell if I'd really killed them or not!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm dumb, so even after reviving them with the <color=#ffd34c>Staff</color>, I couldn't tell if I'd really killed them or not!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So I killed them again! Only when they revived again did I realize they were actually dead!
records.m_Talk_DEU: So I killed them again! Only when they revived again did I realize they were actually dead!
records.m_Talk_FRA: So I killed them again! Only when they revived again did I realize they were actually dead!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why! You're the strongest one here! Because you're smart!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why! You're the strongest one here! Because you're smart!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why! You're the strongest one here! Because you're smart!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Deputy!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Deputy!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Deputy!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?! Why do they keep getting back up even after we beat them?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?! Why do they keep getting back up even after we beat them?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?! Why do they keep getting back up even after we beat them?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come on... Please just stay down already!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come on... Please just stay down already!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come on... Please just stay down already!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unorthodox attacks with no regard for form. But still infused with knightly technique.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unorthodox attacks with no regard for form. But still infused with knightly technique.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unorthodox attacks with no regard for form. But still infused with knightly technique.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This feeling, it's familiar yet unfamiliar...
records.m_Talk_DEU: This feeling, it's familiar yet unfamiliar...
records.m_Talk_FRA: This feeling, it's familiar yet unfamiliar...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You... You're...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You... You're...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You... You're...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yup! I'm with Red Shift!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yup! I'm with Red Shift!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yup! I'm with Red Shift!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Cancer Knight, Ascella Pro
8g Pro... What was the rest again?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Cancer Knight, Ascella Pro
8g Pro... What was the rest again?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Cancer Knight, Ascella Pro
8g Pro... What was the rest again?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, I'm your enemy!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, I'm your enemy!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, I'm your enemy!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But hey, this is weird. Are Blueys usually this weak?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But hey, this is weird. Are Blueys usually this weak?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But hey, this is weird. Are Blueys usually this weak?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or are you just not enough? I need to feel something if I'm gonna enjoy the fight!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Or are you just not enough? I need to feel something if I'm gonna enjoy the fight!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Or are you just not enough? I need to feel something if I'm gonna enjoy the fight!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's see...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's see...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's see...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, that one looks good.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, that one looks good.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, that one looks good.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Arius! Get out of the way!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Arius! Get out of the way!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Arius! Get out of the way!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah... Aaaah...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah... Aaaah...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah... Aaaah...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: S-Sir Hansol!
records.m_Talk_DEU: S-Sir Hansol!
records.m_Talk_FRA: S-Sir Hansol!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm fine. Are you hurt, Arius?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm fine. Are you hurt, Arius?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm fine. Are you hurt, Arius?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why you...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why you...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why you...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ooh, you might be stronger than the yellow Bluey when it comes to raw power.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ooh, you might be stronger than the yellow Bluey when it comes to raw power.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ooh, you might be stronger than the yellow Bluey when it comes to raw power.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But you're too obvious. That's why you get countered!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But you're too obvious. That's why you get countered!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But you're too obvious. That's why you get countered!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Kuh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Kuh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Kuh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Gotcha.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Gotcha.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Gotcha.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Take the shot, Deputy!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Take the shot, Deputy!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Take the shot, Deputy!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Okay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Okay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Okay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well done, Dame Liv.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well done, Dame Liv.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well done, Dame Liv.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff...* *Huff...*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff...* *Huff...*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff...* *Huff...*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fione! Are you all right?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fione! Are you all right?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fione! Are you all right?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. I lost control of my power for a moment, but with that attack...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. I lost control of my power for a moment, but with that attack...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. I lost control of my power for a moment, but with that attack...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It kinda hurts but also not really... I can't even tell if it was a proper hit...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It kinda hurts but also not really... I can't even tell if it was a proper hit...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It kinda hurts but also not really... I can't even tell if it was a proper hit...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, nope. Not good enough. Don't you have anyone stronger?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, nope. Not good enough. Don't you have anyone stronger?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, nope. Not good enough. Don't you have anyone stronger?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're unfazed... by a fully unleashed Armament?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're unfazed... by a fully unleashed Armament?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're unfazed... by a fully unleashed Armament?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? That was supposed to be a fully unleashed Armament?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? That was supposed to be a fully unleashed Armament?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? That was supposed to be a fully unleashed Armament?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, I get it! You were faking it, weren't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, I get it! You were faking it, weren't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, I get it! You were faking it, weren't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Makes sense. You were way weaker than I expected from what Captain told me. I thought I'd gotten stronger.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Makes sense. You were way weaker than I expected from what Captain told me. I thought I'd gotten stronger.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Makes sense. You were way weaker than I expected from what Captain told me. I thought I'd gotten stronger.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stop sending out fakes like you! Bring me the real Blue Shift! I'm on a schedule here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stop sending out fakes like you! Bring me the real Blue Shift! I'm on a schedule here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stop sending out fakes like you! Bring me the real Blue Shift! I'm on a schedule here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where's the real one?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where's the real one?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where's the real one?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right behind you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right behind you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right behind you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Gaaaah!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Gaaaah!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Gaaaah!

records.m_Talk_ENG: My arm! My aaaaarm!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: My arm! My aaaaarm!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: My arm! My aaaaarm!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry to crash the party, Dame Fione. Things were urgent, so I acted on reflex.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry to crash the party, Dame Fione. Things were urgent, so I acted on reflex.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry to crash the party, Dame Fione. Things were urgent, so I acted on reflex.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If even someone like me could land a critical blow, we basically had the win... I should've had more faith.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If even someone like me could land a critical blow, we basically had the win... I should've had more faith.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If even someone like me could land a critical blow, we basically had the win... I should've had more faith.

records.m_Talk_ENG: N-no, thank you for the assist.
records.m_Talk_DEU: N-no, thank you for the assist.
records.m_Talk_FRA: N-no, thank you for the assist.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hey, Hansol. Your sister's way more hardcore than she looks.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hey, Hansol. Your sister's way more hardcore than she looks.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Hey, Hansol. Your sister's way more hardcore than she looks.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's blood splattered everywhere... and she's just smiling.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's blood splattered everywhere... and she's just smiling.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's blood splattered everywhere... and she's just smiling.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She looks like that when she's doing paperwork too...
records.m_Talk_DEU: She looks like that when she's doing paperwork too...
records.m_Talk_FRA: She looks like that when she's doing paperwork too...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, I guess thanks to Deputy and your sister, we caught a crab.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, I guess thanks to Deputy and your sister, we caught a crab.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, I guess thanks to Deputy and your sister, we caught a crab.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So... that's a win, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So... that's a win, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So... that's a win, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Crab? What do you mean?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Crab? What do you mean?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Crab? What do you mean?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The girl you struck down called herself the Knight of Cancer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The girl you struck down called herself the Knight of Cancer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The girl you struck down called herself the Knight of Cancer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The way she swung her weapon felt like a knockoff of the Order's style.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The way she swung her weapon felt like a knockoff of the Order's style.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The way she swung her weapon felt like a knockoff of the Order's style.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's impossible. The Cancer Armament was...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's impossible. The Cancer Armament was...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's impossible. The Cancer Armament was...

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what the?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what the?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what the?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Her arm is... regenerating.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Her arm is... regenerating.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Her arm is... regenerating.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Agh... It hurts... It huuurts!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Agh... It hurts... It huuurts!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Agh... It hurts... It huuurts!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oww! Oww! Oww! Haha! Oww! OWW!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oww! Oww! Oww! Haha! Oww! OWW!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oww! Oww! Oww! Haha! Oww! OWW!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is the best! You're strong! I wanna fight more, more!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is the best! You're strong! I wanna fight more, more!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is the best! You're strong! I wanna fight more, more!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's keep going!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's keep going!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's keep going!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This brat. She's faster now than before even after losing an arm.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This brat. She's faster now than before even after losing an arm.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This brat. She's faster now than before even after losing an arm.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A real problem if this drags out... Guess I've got no choice but to go all in.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A real problem if this drags out... Guess I've got no choice but to go all in.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A real problem if this drags out... Guess I've got no choice but to go all in.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nope! You're my partner right now, remember?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nope! You're my partner right now, remember?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nope! You're my partner right now, remember?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No thinking about anyone else mid-fight!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No thinking about anyone else mid-fight!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No thinking about anyone else mid-fight!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Tsk.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Tsk.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Tsk.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What a pain. This little brat's really testing me...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What a pain. This little brat's really testing me...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What a pain. This little brat's really testing me...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>That's enough, Dame Ascella.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>That's enough, Dame Ascella.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>That's enough, Dame Ascella.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Seriously?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Seriously?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Seriously?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Our objective is complete. We've no time to waste here.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Our objective is complete. We've no time to waste here.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Our objective is complete. We've no time to waste here.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>We've secured the Reactor that merged with a Star Armament during the Qliphoth Game.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>We've secured the Reactor that merged with a Star Armament during the Qliphoth Game.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>We've secured the Reactor that merged with a Star Armament during the Qliphoth Game.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>We also have a rough estimate of Blue Shift's current strength. No need for more bloodshed.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>We also have a rough estimate of Blue Shift's current strength. No need for more bloodshed.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>We also have a rough estimate of Blue Shift's current strength. No need for more bloodshed.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...That voice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...That voice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...That voice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Carantisir?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Carantisir?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Carantisir?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>It's been a while, Dame Medea. Hearing your voice brings back memories.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>It's been a while, Dame Medea. Hearing your voice brings back memories.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>It's been a while, Dame Medea. Hearing your voice brings back memories.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>But your skills have dulled in this era of peace. Grown too comfortable, have you?</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>But your skills have dulled in this era of peace. Grown too comfortable, have you?</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>But your skills have dulled in this era of peace. Grown too comfortable, have you?</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now I understand what the others were talking about. Just hearing your voice explains everything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now I understand what the others were talking about. Just hearing your voice explains everything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now I understand what the others were talking about. Just hearing your voice explains everything.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That girl's regeneration... You really crossed the line with human experimentation?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That girl's regeneration... You really crossed the line with human experimentation?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That girl's regeneration... You really crossed the line with human experimentation?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Isn't it incredible? Just by shedding a bit of humanity, one can wield a Star Armament.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Isn't it incredible? Just by shedding a bit of humanity, one can wield a Star Armament.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Isn't it incredible? Just by shedding a bit of humanity, one can wield a Star Armament.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>With this power, the Order's long-cherished dream is within reach.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>With this power, the Order's long-cherished dream is within reach.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>With this power, the Order's long-cherished dream is within reach.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's be honest here. That wasn't a Star Armament, it was just a cheap knockoff.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's be honest here. That wasn't a Star Armament, it was just a cheap knockoff.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's be honest here. That wasn't a Star Armament, it was just a cheap knockoff.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You think I don't know yours was destroyed ages ago?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You think I don't know yours was destroyed ages ago?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You think I don't know yours was destroyed ages ago?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>True, what Dame Ascella wields is a replica of a Star Armament.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>True, what Dame Ascella wields is a replica of a Star Armament.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>True, what Dame Ascella wields is a replica of a Star Armament.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>But you saw it yourself, the Knights of Redemption's Unique Gear once used by the Demon Lord and his Apostles.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>But you saw it yourself, the Knights of Redemption's Unique Gear once used by the Demon Lord and his Apostles.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>But you saw it yourself, the Knights of Redemption's Unique Gear once used by the Demon Lord and his Apostles.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>The Staff of Resurrection, and how Ascella wielded it.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>The Staff of Resurrection, and how Ascella wielded it.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>The Staff of Resurrection, and how Ascella wielded it.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Since we share the same roots, you could say our experiment was a success.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Since we share the same roots, you could say our experiment was a success.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Since we share the same roots, you could say our experiment was a success.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You're insane.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You're insane.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You're insane.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All that... just for an Armament?
records.m_Talk_DEU: All that... just for an Armament?
records.m_Talk_FRA: All that... just for an Armament?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Sacrifice always accompanies a great cause. You'll come to understand that soon enough.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Sacrifice always accompanies a great cause. You'll come to understand that soon enough.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Sacrifice always accompanies a great cause. You'll come to understand that soon enough.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Dame Ascella. Time to return.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Dame Ascella. Time to return.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Dame Ascella. Time to return.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aw. Can't I fight the sheep girl a little longer?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aw. Can't I fight the sheep girl a little longer?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aw. Can't I fight the sheep girl a little longer?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's tough fighting her as-is, but if I unleash my Armament...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's tough fighting her as-is, but if I unleash my Armament...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's tough fighting her as-is, but if I unleash my Armament...

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>She's beyond your current ability.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>She's beyond your current ability.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>She's beyond your current ability.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>You're not about to sabotage my plan over some fleeting satisfaction, are you?</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>You're not about to sabotage my plan over some fleeting satisfaction, are you?</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>You're not about to sabotage my plan over some fleeting satisfaction, are you?</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I'm sorry. I'm back to my senses!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I'm sorry. I'm back to my senses!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I'm sorry. I'm back to my senses!

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I won't say it again. Return now.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I won't say it again. Return now.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I won't say it again. Return now.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, sir!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, sir!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, sir!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't be ridiculous. You think you can just walk away after doing this to those guys?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't be ridiculous. You think you can just walk away after doing this to those guys?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't be ridiculous. You think you can just walk away after doing this to those guys?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll never forgive you...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll never forgive you...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll never forgive you...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stop, Dame Liv!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stop, Dame Liv!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stop, Dame Liv!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait... What's going on outside...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait... What's going on outside...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait... What's going on outside...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This energy. It feels just like the Qliphoth Game.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This energy. It feels just like the Qliphoth Game.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This energy. It feels just like the Qliphoth Game.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It can't be...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It can't be...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It can't be...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is a safety announcement for citizens from the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is a safety announcement for citizens from the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is a safety announcement for citizens from the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stay indoors as much as possible, and never look up at the sky when outdoors.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stay indoors as much as possible, and never look up at the sky when outdoors.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stay indoors as much as possible, and never look up at the sky when outdoors.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For your safety, follow the Administration's guidelines and do not leave the shelter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For your safety, follow the Administration's guidelines and do not leave the shelter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For your safety, follow the Administration's guidelines and do not leave the shelter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The guidelines will remain in effect until the disaster alert is lifted.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The guidelines will remain in effect until the disaster alert is lifted.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The guidelines will remain in effect until the disaster alert is lifted.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are... you monsters planning?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are... you monsters planning?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are... you monsters planning?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's so unfair. This wasn't our doing, okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's so unfair. This wasn't our doing, okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's so unfair. This wasn't our doing, okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still... Since you're good little Blueys, you better stay inside like the broadcast says.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still... Since you're good little Blueys, you better stay inside like the broadcast says.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still... Since you're good little Blueys, you better stay inside like the broadcast says.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It'd be sad if you died before I could kill you myself!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It'd be sad if you died before I could kill you myself!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It'd be sad if you died before I could kill you myself!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I told you, we're not letting you get away!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I told you, we're not letting you get away!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I told you, we're not letting you get away!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's enough, Dame Liv. Everyone's exhausted.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's enough, Dame Liv. Everyone's exhausted.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's enough, Dame Liv. Everyone's exhausted.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or are you confident you could take her down without any casualties?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Or are you confident you could take her down without any casualties?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Or are you confident you could take her down without any casualties?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-that's...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-that's...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-that's...

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Yes. The day will come when we test whose justice is stronger.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Yes. The day will come when we test whose justice is stronger.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Yes. The day will come when we test whose justice is stronger.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Until then, enjoy your peace while it lasts.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Until then, enjoy your peace while it lasts.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Until then, enjoy your peace while it lasts.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's see how long you can endure this time without your former captain, Blue Shift.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's see how long you can endure this time without your former captain, Blue Shift.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's see how long you can endure this time without your former captain, Blue Shift.

root.m_Talk_ENG: F-Fione! The other knights, they've turned into C.O.s...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: F-Fione! The other knights, they've turned into C.O.s...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: F-Fione! The other knights, they've turned into C.O.s...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: They were all stationed at HQ! What on earth happened here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: They were all stationed at HQ! What on earth happened here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: They were all stationed at HQ! What on earth happened here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Stay calm! If this is part of the Corruption disaster, we absolutely cannot let them escape outside!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Stay calm! If this is part of the Corruption disaster, we absolutely cannot let them escape outside!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Stay calm! If this is part of the Corruption disaster, we absolutely cannot let them escape outside!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Form up! Our top priority is to trap and contain them!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Form up! Our top priority is to trap and contain them!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Form up! Our top priority is to trap and contain them!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Bingo!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Bingo!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Bingo!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You figured out it was necromancy after just a short chat? You're way smarter than me!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You figured out it was necromancy after just a short chat? You're way smarter than me!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You figured out it was necromancy after just a short chat? You're way smarter than me!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm dumb, so even after reviving them with the <color=#ffd34c>Staff</color>, I couldn't tell if I'd really killed them or not!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm dumb, so even after reviving them with the <color=#ffd34c>Staff</color>, I couldn't tell if I'd really killed them or not!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm dumb, so even after reviving them with the <color=#ffd34c>Staff</color>, I couldn't tell if I'd really killed them or not!

root.m_Talk_ENG: So I killed them again! Only when they revived again did I realize they were actually dead!
root.m_Talk_DEU: So I killed them again! Only when they revived again did I realize they were actually dead!
root.m_Talk_FRA: So I killed them again! Only when they revived again did I realize they were actually dead!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's why! You're the strongest one here! Because you're smart!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's why! You're the strongest one here! Because you're smart!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's why! You're the strongest one here! Because you're smart!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Deputy!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Deputy!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Deputy!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What?! Why do they keep getting back up even after we beat them?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What?! Why do they keep getting back up even after we beat them?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What?! Why do they keep getting back up even after we beat them?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Come on... Please just stay down already!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Come on... Please just stay down already!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Come on... Please just stay down already!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Unorthodox attacks with no regard for form. But still infused with knightly technique.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Unorthodox attacks with no regard for form. But still infused with knightly technique.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Unorthodox attacks with no regard for form. But still infused with knightly technique.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This feeling, it's familiar yet unfamiliar...
root.m_Talk_DEU: This feeling, it's familiar yet unfamiliar...
root.m_Talk_FRA: This feeling, it's familiar yet unfamiliar...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You... You're...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You... You're...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You... You're...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yup! I'm with Red Shift!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yup! I'm with Red Shift!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yup! I'm with Red Shift!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Cancer Knight, Ascella Pro
8g Pro... What was the rest again?
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Cancer Knight, Ascella Pro
8g Pro... What was the rest again?
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Cancer Knight, Ascella Pro
8g Pro... What was the rest again?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, I'm your enemy!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, I'm your enemy!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, I'm your enemy!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But hey, this is weird. Are Blueys usually this weak?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But hey, this is weird. Are Blueys usually this weak?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But hey, this is weird. Are Blueys usually this weak?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Or are you just not enough? I need to feel something if I'm gonna enjoy the fight!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Or are you just not enough? I need to feel something if I'm gonna enjoy the fight!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Or are you just not enough? I need to feel something if I'm gonna enjoy the fight!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's see...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's see...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's see...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, that one looks good.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, that one looks good.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, that one looks good.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Arius! Get out of the way!
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Arius! Get out of the way!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Arius! Get out of the way!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah... Aaaah...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah... Aaaah...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah... Aaaah...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: S-Sir Hansol!
root.m_Talk_DEU: S-Sir Hansol!
root.m_Talk_FRA: S-Sir Hansol!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm fine. Are you hurt, Arius?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm fine. Are you hurt, Arius?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm fine. Are you hurt, Arius?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why you...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why you...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why you...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ooh, you might be stronger than the yellow Bluey when it comes to raw power.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ooh, you might be stronger than the yellow Bluey when it comes to raw power.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ooh, you might be stronger than the yellow Bluey when it comes to raw power.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But you're too obvious. That's why you get countered!
root.m_Talk_DEU: But you're too obvious. That's why you get countered!
root.m_Talk_FRA: But you're too obvious. That's why you get countered!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Kuh.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Kuh.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Kuh.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Gotcha.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Gotcha.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Gotcha.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Take the shot, Deputy!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Take the shot, Deputy!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Take the shot, Deputy!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Okay.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Okay.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Okay.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well done, Dame Liv.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well done, Dame Liv.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well done, Dame Liv.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff...* *Huff...*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff...* *Huff...*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff...* *Huff...*

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fione! Are you all right?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fione! Are you all right?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fione! Are you all right?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. I lost control of my power for a moment, but with that attack...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. I lost control of my power for a moment, but with that attack...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. I lost control of my power for a moment, but with that attack...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It kinda hurts but also not really... I can't even tell if it was a proper hit...
root.m_Talk_DEU: It kinda hurts but also not really... I can't even tell if it was a proper hit...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It kinda hurts but also not really... I can't even tell if it was a proper hit...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, nope. Not good enough. Don't you have anyone stronger?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, nope. Not good enough. Don't you have anyone stronger?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, nope. Not good enough. Don't you have anyone stronger?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're unfazed... by a fully unleashed Armament?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're unfazed... by a fully unleashed Armament?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're unfazed... by a fully unleashed Armament?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? That was supposed to be a fully unleashed Armament?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? That was supposed to be a fully unleashed Armament?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? That was supposed to be a fully unleashed Armament?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, I get it! You were faking it, weren't you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, I get it! You were faking it, weren't you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, I get it! You were faking it, weren't you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Makes sense. You were way weaker than I expected from what Captain told me. I thought I'd gotten stronger.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Makes sense. You were way weaker than I expected from what Captain told me. I thought I'd gotten stronger.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Makes sense. You were way weaker than I expected from what Captain told me. I thought I'd gotten stronger.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Stop sending out fakes like you! Bring me the real Blue Shift! I'm on a schedule here!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Stop sending out fakes like you! Bring me the real Blue Shift! I'm on a schedule here!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Stop sending out fakes like you! Bring me the real Blue Shift! I'm on a schedule here!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Where's the real one?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Where's the real one?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Where's the real one?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Right behind you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Right behind you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Right behind you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Gaaaah!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Gaaaah!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Gaaaah!

root.m_Talk_ENG: My arm! My aaaaarm!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: My arm! My aaaaarm!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: My arm! My aaaaarm!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry to crash the party, Dame Fione. Things were urgent, so I acted on reflex.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry to crash the party, Dame Fione. Things were urgent, so I acted on reflex.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry to crash the party, Dame Fione. Things were urgent, so I acted on reflex.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If even someone like me could land a critical blow, we basically had the win... I should've had more faith.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If even someone like me could land a critical blow, we basically had the win... I should've had more faith.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If even someone like me could land a critical blow, we basically had the win... I should've had more faith.

root.m_Talk_ENG: N-no, thank you for the assist.
root.m_Talk_DEU: N-no, thank you for the assist.
root.m_Talk_FRA: N-no, thank you for the assist.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hey, Hansol. Your sister's way more hardcore than she looks.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hey, Hansol. Your sister's way more hardcore than she looks.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Hey, Hansol. Your sister's way more hardcore than she looks.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's blood splattered everywhere... and she's just smiling.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's blood splattered everywhere... and she's just smiling.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's blood splattered everywhere... and she's just smiling.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She looks like that when she's doing paperwork too...
root.m_Talk_DEU: She looks like that when she's doing paperwork too...
root.m_Talk_FRA: She looks like that when she's doing paperwork too...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, I guess thanks to Deputy and your sister, we caught a crab.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, I guess thanks to Deputy and your sister, we caught a crab.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, I guess thanks to Deputy and your sister, we caught a crab.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So... that's a win, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So... that's a win, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So... that's a win, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Crab? What do you mean?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Crab? What do you mean?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Crab? What do you mean?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The girl you struck down called herself the Knight of Cancer.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The girl you struck down called herself the Knight of Cancer.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The girl you struck down called herself the Knight of Cancer.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The way she swung her weapon felt like a knockoff of the Order's style.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The way she swung her weapon felt like a knockoff of the Order's style.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The way she swung her weapon felt like a knockoff of the Order's style.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's impossible. The Cancer Armament was...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's impossible. The Cancer Armament was...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's impossible. The Cancer Armament was...

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-what the?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-what the?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-what the?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Her arm is... regenerating.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Her arm is... regenerating.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Her arm is... regenerating.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Agh... It hurts... It huuurts!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Agh... It hurts... It huuurts!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Agh... It hurts... It huuurts!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oww! Oww! Oww! Haha! Oww! OWW!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oww! Oww! Oww! Haha! Oww! OWW!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oww! Oww! Oww! Haha! Oww! OWW!

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is the best! You're strong! I wanna fight more, more!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is the best! You're strong! I wanna fight more, more!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is the best! You're strong! I wanna fight more, more!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's keep going!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's keep going!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's keep going!

root.m_Talk_ENG: This brat. She's faster now than before even after losing an arm.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This brat. She's faster now than before even after losing an arm.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This brat. She's faster now than before even after losing an arm.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A real problem if this drags out... Guess I've got no choice but to go all in.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A real problem if this drags out... Guess I've got no choice but to go all in.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A real problem if this drags out... Guess I've got no choice but to go all in.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Nope! You're my partner right now, remember?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Nope! You're my partner right now, remember?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Nope! You're my partner right now, remember?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No thinking about anyone else mid-fight!
root.m_Talk_DEU: No thinking about anyone else mid-fight!
root.m_Talk_FRA: No thinking about anyone else mid-fight!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Tsk.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Tsk.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Tsk.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What a pain. This little brat's really testing me...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What a pain. This little brat's really testing me...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What a pain. This little brat's really testing me...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>That's enough, Dame Ascella.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>That's enough, Dame Ascella.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>That's enough, Dame Ascella.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Seriously?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Seriously?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Seriously?

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Our objective is complete. We've no time to waste here.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Our objective is complete. We've no time to waste here.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Our objective is complete. We've no time to waste here.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>We've secured the Reactor that merged with a Star Armament during the Qliphoth Game.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>We've secured the Reactor that merged with a Star Armament during the Qliphoth Game.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>We've secured the Reactor that merged with a Star Armament during the Qliphoth Game.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>We also have a rough estimate of Blue Shift's current strength. No need for more bloodshed.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>We also have a rough estimate of Blue Shift's current strength. No need for more bloodshed.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>We also have a rough estimate of Blue Shift's current strength. No need for more bloodshed.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...That voice.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...That voice.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...That voice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Carantisir?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Carantisir?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Carantisir?

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>It's been a while, Dame Medea. Hearing your voice brings back memories.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>It's been a while, Dame Medea. Hearing your voice brings back memories.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>It's been a while, Dame Medea. Hearing your voice brings back memories.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>But your skills have dulled in this era of peace. Grown too comfortable, have you?</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>But your skills have dulled in this era of peace. Grown too comfortable, have you?</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>But your skills have dulled in this era of peace. Grown too comfortable, have you?</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now I understand what the others were talking about. Just hearing your voice explains everything.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now I understand what the others were talking about. Just hearing your voice explains everything.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now I understand what the others were talking about. Just hearing your voice explains everything.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That girl's regeneration... You really crossed the line with human experimentation?
root.m_Talk_DEU: That girl's regeneration... You really crossed the line with human experimentation?
root.m_Talk_FRA: That girl's regeneration... You really crossed the line with human experimentation?

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Isn't it incredible? Just by shedding a bit of humanity, one can wield a Star Armament.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Isn't it incredible? Just by shedding a bit of humanity, one can wield a Star Armament.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Isn't it incredible? Just by shedding a bit of humanity, one can wield a Star Armament.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>With this power, the Order's long-cherished dream is within reach.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>With this power, the Order's long-cherished dream is within reach.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>With this power, the Order's long-cherished dream is within reach.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's be honest here. That wasn't a Star Armament, it was just a cheap knockoff.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's be honest here. That wasn't a Star Armament, it was just a cheap knockoff.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's be honest here. That wasn't a Star Armament, it was just a cheap knockoff.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You think I don't know yours was destroyed ages ago?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You think I don't know yours was destroyed ages ago?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You think I don't know yours was destroyed ages ago?

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>True, what Dame Ascella wields is a replica of a Star Armament.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>True, what Dame Ascella wields is a replica of a Star Armament.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>True, what Dame Ascella wields is a replica of a Star Armament.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>But you saw it yourself, the Knights of Redemption's Unique Gear once used by the Demon Lord and his Apostles.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>But you saw it yourself, the Knights of Redemption's Unique Gear once used by the Demon Lord and his Apostles.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>But you saw it yourself, the Knights of Redemption's Unique Gear once used by the Demon Lord and his Apostles.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>The Staff of Resurrection, and how Ascella wielded it.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>The Staff of Resurrection, and how Ascella wielded it.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>The Staff of Resurrection, and how Ascella wielded it.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Since we share the same roots, you could say our experiment was a success.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Since we share the same roots, you could say our experiment was a success.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Since we share the same roots, you could say our experiment was a success.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...You're insane.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...You're insane.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...You're insane.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All that... just for an Armament?
root.m_Talk_DEU: All that... just for an Armament?
root.m_Talk_FRA: All that... just for an Armament?

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Sacrifice always accompanies a great cause. You'll come to understand that soon enough.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Sacrifice always accompanies a great cause. You'll come to understand that soon enough.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Sacrifice always accompanies a great cause. You'll come to understand that soon enough.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Dame Ascella. Time to return.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Dame Ascella. Time to return.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Dame Ascella. Time to return.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aw. Can't I fight the sheep girl a little longer?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aw. Can't I fight the sheep girl a little longer?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aw. Can't I fight the sheep girl a little longer?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's tough fighting her as-is, but if I unleash my Armament...
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's tough fighting her as-is, but if I unleash my Armament...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's tough fighting her as-is, but if I unleash my Armament...

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>She's beyond your current ability.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>She's beyond your current ability.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>She's beyond your current ability.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>You're not about to sabotage my plan over some fleeting satisfaction, are you?</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>You're not about to sabotage my plan over some fleeting satisfaction, are you?</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>You're not about to sabotage my plan over some fleeting satisfaction, are you?</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: I-I'm sorry. I'm back to my senses!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I-I'm sorry. I'm back to my senses!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I-I'm sorry. I'm back to my senses!

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I won't say it again. Return now.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I won't say it again. Return now.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I won't say it again. Return now.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, sir!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, sir!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, sir!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't be ridiculous. You think you can just walk away after doing this to those guys?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't be ridiculous. You think you can just walk away after doing this to those guys?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't be ridiculous. You think you can just walk away after doing this to those guys?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll never forgive you...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll never forgive you...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll never forgive you...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Stop, Dame Liv!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Stop, Dame Liv!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Stop, Dame Liv!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait... What's going on outside...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait... What's going on outside...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait... What's going on outside...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: This energy. It feels just like the Qliphoth Game.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This energy. It feels just like the Qliphoth Game.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This energy. It feels just like the Qliphoth Game.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It can't be...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It can't be...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It can't be...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is a safety announcement for citizens from the Administration.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is a safety announcement for citizens from the Administration.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is a safety announcement for citizens from the Administration.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Stay indoors as much as possible, and never look up at the sky when outdoors.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Stay indoors as much as possible, and never look up at the sky when outdoors.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Stay indoors as much as possible, and never look up at the sky when outdoors.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For your safety, follow the Administration's guidelines and do not leave the shelter.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For your safety, follow the Administration's guidelines and do not leave the shelter.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For your safety, follow the Administration's guidelines and do not leave the shelter.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The guidelines will remain in effect until the disaster alert is lifted.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The guidelines will remain in effect until the disaster alert is lifted.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The guidelines will remain in effect until the disaster alert is lifted.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are... you monsters planning?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are... you monsters planning?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are... you monsters planning?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's so unfair. This wasn't our doing, okay?
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's so unfair. This wasn't our doing, okay?
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's so unfair. This wasn't our doing, okay?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Still... Since you're good little Blueys, you better stay inside like the broadcast says.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Still... Since you're good little Blueys, you better stay inside like the broadcast says.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Still... Since you're good little Blueys, you better stay inside like the broadcast says.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It'd be sad if you died before I could kill you myself!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It'd be sad if you died before I could kill you myself!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It'd be sad if you died before I could kill you myself!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I told you, we're not letting you get away!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I told you, we're not letting you get away!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I told you, we're not letting you get away!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's enough, Dame Liv. Everyone's exhausted.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's enough, Dame Liv. Everyone's exhausted.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's enough, Dame Liv. Everyone's exhausted.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Or are you confident you could take her down without any casualties?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Or are you confident you could take her down without any casualties?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Or are you confident you could take her down without any casualties?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Th-that's...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Th-that's...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Th-that's...

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Yes. The day will come when we test whose justice is stronger.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Yes. The day will come when we test whose justice is stronger.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Yes. The day will come when we test whose justice is stronger.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Until then, enjoy your peace while it lasts.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Until then, enjoy your peace while it lasts.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Until then, enjoy your peace while it lasts.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's see how long you can endure this time without your former captain, Blue Shift.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's see how long you can endure this time without your former captain, Blue Shift.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's see how long you can endure this time without your former captain, Blue Shift.
